reviews.review_description:
The environment and atmosphere are simple, but feel very polished. The enemy mechanics play to the strengths of VR, which is nice to see. Being tied into the SCP lore and being able to read the wiki page before launching the game built even more suspense.
I had a fun afternoon and almost beat it. Will definitely be doing a few more sessions to get to the final floor. For the price, that's really good value.
